http://www.miwatch.org/2008/04/race_genetics_metabolism_drug_1.html

Levy RA (1993) Ethnic and racial differences in response to medicines: preserving individualized therapy in managed pharmaceutical programmes. Pharm Med 7:139–165

http://www.migrationpolicy.org/article/chinese-immigrants-united-states

https://nccih.nih.gov/health/whatiscam/chinesemed.htm
Seidel H, Ball J, Dains J, Benedict W (1994) Quick reference to cultural assessment. Mosby, St. Louis

Shek DT (2010) Oxford handbook of Chinese psychology. Oxford handbooks, vol 1. Oxford University Press, Oxford.
https://academic.oup.com/edited-volume/38605
Tsai HM (2013) People of Chinese heritage. In: Purnell L (ed) Transcultural health care: a culturally competent approach, 4th edn. F. A. Davis Company, Philadelphia

World Bank (2016) Smoking prevalence among males.
http://data.worldbank.org/indicator/SH. PRV. SMOK. MA

Yasuda SU (2008) The role of ethnicity in variability in response to drugs: focus on clinical pharmacology studies. Clin Pharmacol Ther 84(3):417–423 https://doi.org/10.1038/clpt.2008.141
PubMed

PubMed
